title: Smoky Frittata
description: A twist on the classic Italian omelette, filled with smoky flavor. Perfect for a quick and satisfying breakfast or brunch.

ingredients.name: scrambled eggs
ingredients.notes: used as a substitute for some of the smoky eggs

instructions: In a large skillet, scramble the smoky eggs and set aside.
If using pre-made frittata, proceed to the next step.
In the same skillet, add the shredded american cheese and let it melt.
Add the scrambled eggs and mix well.
If using pre-made frittata, crumble it into the skillet and mix well.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the eggs are set and the top is golden brown.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
